question: What is the full list of hook events a charm can observe? List them all.

claude_output.result:
Here is the full list of hook events a charm can observe:

## Lifecycle

- `install`
- `start`
- `config_changed`
- `update_status`
- `upgrade_charm`
- `stop`
- `remove`

## Leadership

- `leader_elected`
- `leader_settings_changed` _(deprecated since ops 2.4.0)_

## Relations _(one set per relation name in metadata)_

- `<relation>_relation_created`
- `<relation>_relation_joined`
- `<relation>_relation_changed`
- `<relation>_relation_departed`
- `<relation>_relation_broken`

## Storage _(one set per storage name in metadata)_

- `<storage>_storage_attached`
- `<storage>_storage_detaching`

## Pebble / Containers _(one set per container name in metadata)_

- `<container>_pebble_ready`
- `<container>_pebble_custom_notice`
- `<container>_pebble_check_failed`
- `<container>_pebble_check_recovered`

## Secrets

- `secret_changed` _(observer side)_
- `secret_expired` _(owner side)_
- `secret_rotate` _(owner side)_
- `secret_remove` _(owner side)_

## Status Collection

- `collect_app_status` _(leader only)_
- `collect_unit_status`

## Actions _(one per action defined in metadata)_

- `<action>_action`

## Series Upgrade _(machine charms, removed in Juju 4.0)_

- `pre_series_upgrade`
- `post_series_upgrade`

## Metrics _(removed in Juju 3.6.11)_

- `collect_metrics`
